docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: DISMISSAL. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/8/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FRANK WILLIMAS IS NOTPRESENT. DEFENDANT SHEREENA ADDULLAH IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
